personal.name: Dyanaraj Vanniyar
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building scalable web applications and AI-powered systems.

about.bio: I'm a software engineer who thrives at the intersection of performance and intelligence. With hands-on experience building production systems using React, .NET, FastAPI, and AI-driven pipelines, I turn complex requirements into clean, scalable architecture. I care deeply about the quality of what I build — from the data layer up.

projects.title: Candidate Portal
projects.description: AI-powered resume parsing and intelligent dashboard for recruiters. Automated candidate data extraction with NLP pipelines.

projects.title: Report AI
projects.description: Natural language to structured report generation system. Users describe what they need — the system delivers formatted, data-driven reports.

experience.description: Building and maintaining full-stack web applications with React and .NET. Developing AI-powered features including report generation systems and candidate portals.
